2026-02-14

# 2026-02-14 - 2nd Brain Build + Comp Plan + Model Update ## Morning - Mat asked about 2nd brain project status - Continued build work on clawd-brain Next.js app ## 2nd Brain Build Status **Location:** `/home/node/openclaw/projects/clawd-brain/` **Completed:**

2026-02-06

# 2026-02-06 - Pre-Compaction Flush ## Major Features Shipped ### Bidirectional HubSpot Editing - Pipeline API now supports forecast tracking (`hs_manual_forecast_category`) - Edit modal for deals: Stage, Amount, Close Date, Next Step, Forecast Category - New endpoints: `/api/hubspot/update` (writes), `/api/hubspot/properties` (debug) - Date filters added: All Deals, This Month, This Quarter - Forecast normalization handles HubSpot values: OMIT, PIPELINE, BEST_CASE, COMMIT, CLOSED

2026-02-05

# 2026-02-05 - Clawd Dashboard & Data Pipeline ## Dashboard Progress - Built Clawd Command Center at `/home/node/openclaw/projects/clawd-dashboard/` - Deployed to Vercel: https://clawd-dashboard-eight.vercel.app - Features: Pipeline view (HubSpot), Calendar tab, Emails tab, KPI cards ## Google Data Cache System (NEW) - Created cache directory: `/home/node/openclaw/cache/` - Cache files: `emails.json`, `calendar.json`

2026-02-04

# 2026-02-04 — Email Agent + Skills + Dashboard ## NEW: Dashboard Project Starting Mat wants an interactive dashboard with: - Pipeline Kanban (drag-drop deals) - Task Board (To Do / In Progress / Done) - AI Chat (talk to Clawd) - Email Triage (grouped by priority) - Meeting Prep cards - KPI Dashboard

2026-02-03

# 2026-02-03 ## Major Setup Day — Clawd Goes Live 🦞 ### Identity & Config - Restored Clawd identity (SOUL.md, USER.md, IDENTITY.md, MEMORY.md) - Model routing: Kimi K2 primary → MiniMax fallback → Opus sensitive only - Timezone: America/Los_Angeles ### Infrastructure Connected
